<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8">
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
<title>Balloon Color Planner — The Balloon Lady</title>
<style>
*{box-sizing:border-box;margin:0;padding:0}
body{font-family:-apple-system,BlinkMacSystemFont,"Segoe UI",Roboto,"Helvetica Neue",Arial,sans-serif;background:#fafafa;padding:20px}
#bp{max-width:1100px;margin:0 auto;background:#fff;border-radius:12px;padding:24px;box-shadow:0 2px 12px rgba(0,0,0,.06)}

h1{font-size:24px;font-weight:600;color:#333;margin-bottom:8px}
.subtitle{font-size:13px;color:#888;margin-bottom:24px}

.top-area{display:grid;grid-template-columns:360px 1fr;gap:32px;margin-bottom:40px}
#canvas-wrap{background:linear-gradient(135deg, #faf8f5 0%, #f5f2ed 100%);border-radius:12px;border:1px solid #e8e4df;padding:20px;height:380px;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;position:relative}
#bsvg{width:100%;height:100%;display:block}

#your-selection{background:#fff;border:1px solid #e8e4df;border-radius:12px;padding:24px}
.selection-title{font-size:11px;font-weight:600;color:#666;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.08em;margin-bottom:16px}
.sel-row{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:12px;margin-bottom:16px}
.sel-label{font-size:12px;font-weight:600;color:#666;min-width:110px;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.06em}
.sel-box{flex:1;min-height:68px;border-radius:10px;border:2px solid #e8e4df;display:flex;align-items:center;padding:8px 12px;gap:12px;background:#fafafa;transition:all .2s;position:relative}
.sel-box.filled{border:2px solid #333}
.sel-mini{width:52px;height:52px;flex-shrink:0;border-radius:8px;overflow:hidden}
.sel-info{flex:1}
.sel-name{font-size:14px;font-weight:600;color:#333}
.sel-clear{position:absolute;top:8px;right:12px;width:24px;height:24px;border-radius:50%;background:#f5f5f5;border:none;color:#999;font-size:18px;cursor:pointer;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center}
.sel-clear:hover{background:#e8e8e8;color:#333}

#photo-preview{background:#fff;border:1px solid #e8e4df;border-radius:12px;padding:24px;margin-bottom:40px}
.photo-title{font-size:11px;font-weight:600;color:#2a6030;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.08em;margin-bottom:12px}
#photo-canvas{max-width:100%;max-height:420px;box-shadow:0 4px 20px rgba(0,0,0,.1);border-radius:8px;display:block;margin:0 auto}

.arr-strip{display:flex;gap:12px;flex-wrap:wrap;margin-top:20px}
.arr-thumb{width:88px;height:88px;border-radius:10px;border:2px solid #e0e0e0;cursor:pointer;padding:6px;background:#faf8f5;transition:all .15s;position:relative}
.arr-thumb:hover{border-color:#999}
.arr-thumb.on{border-color:#2a6030;border-width:4px;padding:4px;box-shadow:0 0 0 4px rgba(42,96,48,.1)}
.arr-thumb svg{width:100%;height:100%;display:block}
.arr-name{position:absolute;bottom:-22px;left:0;right:0;text-align:center;font-size:11px;color:#666;font-weight:500}
.arr-thumb.on .arr-name{color:#2a6030}

.section-label{font-size:11px;font-weight:600;color:#666;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.08em;margin-bottom:12px}

#color-search-wrapper{margin-bottom:16px}
#color-search{width:100%;padding:14px 20px;font-size:15px;border:2px solid #e8e4df;border-radius:10px;outline:none;transition:all .2s}
#color-search:focus{border-color:#2a6030;box-shadow:0 0 0 3px rgba(42,96,48,.1)}

.color-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(8, 1fr);gap:14px;max-height:520px;overflow-y:auto;padding-right:12px}
.color-grid::-webkit-scrollbar{width:6px}
.color-grid::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb{background:#ddd;border-radius:10px}
.color-card{cursor:pointer;border-radius:10px;border:2px solid transparent;padding:8px;background:#fafafa;transition:all .15s;position:relative}
.color-card:hover{border-color:#ddd;background:#fff;transform:translateY(-2px);box-shadow:0 4px 12px rgba(0,0,0,.08)}
.color-card.active-main{border-color:#2a6030;border-width:3px;padding:7px}
.color-card.active-accent{border-color:#c0006a;border-width:3px;padding:7px}
.color-mini-cluster{width:100%;aspect-ratio:1;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;margin-bottom:6px}
.color-name{font-size:10px;text-align:center;color:#666;font-weight:500;line-height:1.3}
.badge{position:absolute;top:6px;right:6px;background:#2a6030;color:#fff;font-size:9px;font-weight:700;padding:2px 6px;border-radius:999px}
.badge.accent{background:#c0006a}

.plan-box{background:#f8f8f8;border-radius:10px;padding:20px;margin-top:40px}
.plan-title{font-size:11px;font-weight:600;color:#666;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.08em;margin-bottom:12px}
.plan-row{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px;margin-bottom:8px;font-size:13px}
.plan-dot{width:14px;height:14px;border-radius:50%;border:1px solid rgba(0,0,0,.1);flex-shrink:0}
.plan-name{flex:1;color:#333;font-weight:500}
.plan-cnt{color:#666;font-variant-numeric:tabular-nums}
.plan-empty{font-size:12px;color:#999;font-style:italic}
#copy-btn{margin-top:16px;width:100%;padding:14px;font-size:15px;border:none;border-radius:8px;cursor:pointer;background:#2a6030;color:#fff;font-weight:600}
#copy-btn:hover{background:#1f4823}

@media (max-width: 768px) {
  .top-area{grid-template-columns:1fr}
  .color-grid{grid-template-columns:repeat(4, 1fr);max-height:420px}
  #photo-preview{padding:16px}
}
</style>
</head>
<body>

<div id="bp">
  <h1>Balloon Color Planner</h1>
  <p class="subtitle">Design your custom arrangement — most use 1-2 colors</p>

  <!-- TOP AREA: Preview + Your Selection -->
  <div class="top-area">
    <div id="canvas-wrap">
      <svg id="bsvg" viewBox="0 0 180 160" preserveAspectRatio="xMidYMid meet"></svg>
    </div>

    <!-- YOUR SELECTION (now includes Arrangement Shape) -->
    <div id="your-selection">
      <div class="selection-title">YOUR SELECTION</div>
      
      <div class="sel-row">
        <div class="sel-label">MAIN COLOR</div>
        <div class="sel-box" id="main-box">
          <span class="sel-hint">Click a color below</span>
        </div>
      </div>

      <div class="sel-row">
        <div class="sel-label">ACCENT</div>
        <div class="sel-box" id="accent-box">
          <span class="sel-hint">Optional — click any color again</span>
        </div>
      </div>

      <!-- Arrangement Shape moved here -->
      <div class="section-label" style="margin-top:24px;margin-bottom:8px">ARRANGEMENT SHAPE</div>
      <div class="arr-strip" id="arr-strip"></div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- Realistic Photo Preview -->
  <div id="photo-preview">
    <div class="photo-title">REALISTIC PHOTO PREVIEW — LIVE ON REAL BALLOONS</div>
    <canvas id="photo-canvas" width="300" height="356"></canvas>
  </div>

  <!-- Choose Colors -->
  <div>
    <div class="section-label">CHOOSE COLORS</div>
    
    <div id="color-search-wrapper">
      <input id="color-search" type="text" placeholder="🔎 Search colors (e.g. pink, metallic, teal, rose...)">
    </div>
    
    <div class="color-grid" id="color-grid"></div>
  </div>

  <!-- Order Summary -->
  <div class="plan-box">
    <div class="plan-title">ORDER SUMMARY</div>
    <div id="plan-rows"></div>
    <button id="copy-btn" onclick="copyPlan()">Copy to clipboard</button>
  </div>
</div>

<script>
// ====================== FULL COLOR CHART (exact order from your official chart) ======================
const COLORS = [
  {name:"Crystal Clear",hex:"#F8F8F8"},{name:"Fashion White",hex:"#FAFAFA"},{name:"Pearl White",hex:"#F5F0E8"},{name:"Pastel Dusk Cream",hex:"#F0E6D9"},{name:"Silk Oyster White",hex:"#F0E8E0"},{name:"Deluxe White Sand",hex:"#EDE6D8"},
  {name:"Pastel Matte Yellow",hex:"#F8E58C"},{name:"Neon Yellow",hex:"#E5D103"},{name:"Fashion Yellow",hex:"#E5D103"},{name:"Deluxe Honey Yellow",hex:"#F2C94C"},{name:"Deluxe Mustard",hex:"#D9B03C"},{name:"Deluxe Latte",hex:"#C8B8A0"},
  {name:"Metallic Gold",hex:"#D4AF37"},{name:"Reflex Gold",hex:"#C9A227"},{name:"Silk Gold Dust",hex:"#C9B68A"},{name:"Reflex Champagne",hex:"#F2D98B"},{name:"Pastel Matte Melon",hex:"#FFB8A0"},{name:"Metallic Rose Gold",hex:"#D4A0A0"},
  {name:"Pastel Matte Malibu Peach",hex:"#FFCCB3"},{name:"Pastel Matte Nude Blush",hex:"#F8D2C0"},{name:"Deluxe Peach",hex:"#FFB0A8"},{name:"Neon Orange",hex:"#FF6A00"},{name:"Fashion Orange",hex:"#FC6C02"},{name:"Deluxe Sunset Orange",hex:"#FF7A2A"},
  {name:"Deluxe Mocha",hex:"#8B6040"},{name:"Deluxe Coffee",hex:"#7C5030"},{name:"Deluxe Chocolate",hex:"#5A3018"},{name:"Reflex Truffle",hex:"#8C5F3E"},{name:"Fashion Red",hex:"#CC1020"},{name:"Metallic Starfire",hex:"#C41A30"},
  {name:"Reflex Crystal Red",hex:"#E6002E"},{name:"Deluxe Imperial Red",hex:"#CC0000"},{name:"Deluxe Merlot",hex:"#800020"},{name:"Reflex Fuchsia",hex:"#E6007E"},{name:"Fashion Bubble Gum Pink",hex:"#FF69B4"},{name:"Pastel Matte Pink",hex:"#FAD0DA"},
  {name:"Pastel Dusk Rose",hex:"#E8B8C8"},{name:"Deluxe Rosewood",hex:"#A04060"},{name:"Deluxe Tropical Coral",hex:"#FF7F50"},{name:"Deluxe Rose",hex:"#E08090"},{name:"Metallic Fuchsia",hex:"#CC0068"},{name:"Deluxe Fuchsia",hex:"#E6007E"},
  {name:"Deluxe Raspberry",hex:"#C81E5E"},{name:"Neon Magenta",hex:"#FF0090"},{name:"Pearl Pink",hex:"#F0C0CC"},{name:"Silk Pink Blossom",hex:"#F8B8D0"},{name:"Reflex Pink",hex:"#FF69B4"},{name:"Reflex Rose Gold",hex:"#D4A0A0"},
  {name:"Silk Light Amethyst",hex:"#B8A0C8"},{name:"Pastel Matte Lilac",hex:"#C8A0E0"},{name:"Deluxe Lilac",hex:"#B098C4"},{name:"Pastel Dusk Lavender",hex:"#B098C4"},{name:"Pearl Lilac",hex:"#C8A0E0"},{name:"Reflex Violet",hex:"#7B2880"},
  {name:"Deluxe Purple Orchid",hex:"#9B2E7E"},{name:"Fashion Violet",hex:"#7B2880"},{name:"Deluxe Periwinkle Blue",hex:"#8C9EFF"},{name:"Fashion Navy",hex:"#14204A"},{name:"Reflex Blue",hex:"#0028C0"},{name:"Reflex Galaxy Blue",hex:"#1E3A8A"},
  {name:"Deluxe Deep Teal",hex:"#008888"},{name:"Metallic Blue",hex:"#1848B0"},{name:"Fashion Royal Blue",hex:"#1848B0"},{name:"Silk Arctic Blue",hex:"#78A8D4"},{name:"Pastel Dusk Blue",hex:"#A8C8E0"},{name:"Neon Blue",hex:"#00B0FF"},
  {name:"Fashion Blue",hex:"#78A8D4"},{name:"Deluxe Turquoise Blue",hex:"#18B0B0"},{name:"Pearl Blue",hex:"#C8E4F4"},{name:"Pastel Matte Blue",hex:"#B8D0E8"},{name:"Fashion Robin's Egg Blue",hex:"#78C8C8"},{name:"Pastel Matte Green",hex:"#B8E8C8"},
  {name:"Neon Green",hex:"#88CC00"},{name:"Deluxe Key Lime",hex:"#B0E000"},{name:"Fashion Green",hex:"#008840"},{name:"Metallic Green",hex:"#2A6030"},{name:"Deluxe Shamrock Green",hex:"#008840"},{name:"Fashion Forest Green",hex:"#2A6030"},
  {name:"Metallic Silver",hex:"#C8C8C8"},{name:"Silk Cream Pearl",hex:"#F5F0E8"},{name:"Reflex Silver",hex:"#B8B8C0"},{name:"Silk Midnight Grey",hex:"#5A5A5A"},{name:"Metallic Black",hex:"#2A2A2A"},{name:"Deluxe Black",hex:"#1A1A1A"}
];

const CLUSTER = [{id:0,cx:90,cy:50,r:26,size:"large"},{id:1,cx:64,cy:68,r:24,size:"large"},{id:2,cx:116,cy:72,r:25,size:"large"},{id:3,cx:52,cy:92,r:18,size:"medium"},{id:4,cx:88,cy:88,r:19,size:"medium"},{id:5,cx:124,cy:96,r:17,size:"medium"},{id:6,cx:68,cy:112,r:14,size:"small"},{id:7,cx:96,cy:116,r:15,size:"small"},{id:8,cx:116,cy:114,r:13,size:"small"}];

const ARRANGEMENTS = [
  {id:"cluster", name:"Cluster", balloons:CLUSTER},
  {id:"column", name:"Column", balloons:[{id:0,cx:65,cy:25,r:22,size:"large"},{id:1,cx:115,cy:24,r:18,size:"medium"},{id:2,cx:65,cy:58,r:22,size:"large"},{id:3,cx:115,cy:57,r:18,size:"medium"},{id:4,cx:65,cy:91,r:22,size:"large"},{id:5,cx:115,cy:90,r:18,size:"medium"},{id:6,cx:65,cy:124,r:22,size:"large"},{id:7,cx:115,cy:123,r:18,size:"medium"},{id:8,cx:65,cy:152,r:14,size:"small"}]},
  {id:"arch", name:"Arch", balloons:[{id:0,cx:25,cy:140,r:20,size:"large"},{id:1,cx:48,cy:112,r:16,size:"medium"},{id:2,cx:68,cy:82,r:20,size:"large"},{id:3,cx:90,cy:58,r:24,size:"large"},{id:4,cx:115,cy:58,r:20,size:"large"},{id:5,cx:136,cy:82,r:16,size:"medium"},{id:6,cx:156,cy:112,r:20,size:"large"},{id:7,cx:175,cy:140,r:16,size:"medium"}]}
];

const S = { arrIdx: 0, mainColor: null, accentColor: null, colors: {} };
let currentFilter = '';

function arr() { return ARRANGEMENTS[S.arrIdx]; }

// ====================== PHOTO RECOLOR ======================
const PHOTO_B64 = '';

const PHOTO_W = 300;
const PHOTO_H = 356;

const RAW_REGIONS = [{"id":0,"cx":121.4,"cy":41.4,"r":12.7,"role":"small"},{"id":1,"cx":216.4,"cy":52.9,"r":34.6,"role":"large"},{"id":2,"cx":145.0,"cy":58.6,"r":15.0,"role":"small"},{"id":3,"cx":158.6,"cy":71.4,"r":13.7,"role":"small"},{"id":4,"cx":210.0,"cy":72.9,"r":31.0,"role":"medium"},{"id":5,"cx":195.7,"cy":86.4,"r":30.1,"role":"medium"},{"id":6,"cx":110.7,"cy":99.3,"r":38.6,"role":"large"},{"id":7,"cx":251.4,"cy":100.0,"r":23.4,"role":"medium"},{"id":8,"cx":190.7,"cy":112.9,"r":32.9,"role":"medium"},{"id":9,"cx":79.3,"cy":117.9,"r":35.1,"role":"large"},{"id":10,"cx":152.1,"cy":149.3,"r":38.8,"role":"large"},{"id":11,"cx":35.7,"cy":154.3,"r":13.9,"role":"small"},{"id":12,"cx":95.7,"cy":172.1,"r":29.7,"role":"medium"},{"id":13,"cx":43.6,"cy":178.6,"r":21.4,"role":"medium"},{"id":14,"cx":61.4,"cy":208.6,"r":17.9,"role":"small"},{"id":15,"cx":175.7,"cy":215.0,"r":18.0,"role":"small"},{"id":16,"cx":114.3,"cy":225.0,"r":36.2,"role":"large"},{"id":17,"cx":63.6,"cy":267.1,"r":35.6,"role":"large"}];

const REGIONS = RAW_REGIONS.map(r => ({...r, path(ctx){ctx.arc(r.cx,r.cy,r.r*0.95,0,Math.PI*2)}}));

const Recolor = (() => {
  let _photoImg = null;
  function loadPhoto(callback) {
    const img = new Image();
    img.src = 'data:image/jpeg;base64,' + PHOTO_B64;
    img.onload = () => { _photoImg = img; if (callback) callback(); };
    img.onerror = () => console.error("❌ Photo failed to load");
  }
  function recolor(ctx, regions, colorMap) {
    if (!_photoImg) return;
    const W = ctx.canvas.width, H = ctx.canvas.height;
    ctx.clearRect(0, 0, W, H);
    ctx.drawImage(_photoImg, 0, 0, W, H);
    regions.forEach(region => {
      const color = colorMap[region.id];
      if (!color) return;
      ctx.save();
      ctx.beginPath();
      region.path(ctx);
      ctx.clip();
      ctx.globalCompositeOperation = 'color'; ctx.globalAlpha = 0.92; ctx.fillStyle = color; ctx.fillRect(0, 0, W, H);
      ctx.globalCompositeOperation = 'multiply'; ctx.globalAlpha = 0.35; ctx.drawImage(_photoImg, 0, 0, W, H);
      ctx.globalCompositeOperation = 'screen'; ctx.globalAlpha = 0.12; ctx.fillStyle = '#ffffff'; ctx.fillRect(0, 0, W, H);
      ctx.restore();
    });
  }
  return { loadPhoto, recolor };
})();

// ====================== CORE FUNCTIONS ======================
function initColors() { S.colors = {}; autoFill(); }
function autoFill() {
  const bs = arr().balloons;
  bs.forEach(b => {
    if (b.size === 'small' && S.accentColor) S.colors[b.id] = S.accentColor.hex;
    else if (S.mainColor) S.colors[b.id] = S.mainColor.hex;
    else S.colors[b.id] = null;
  });
}
function lum(hex) {
  const r=parseInt(hex.slice(1,3),16), g=parseInt(hex.slice(3,5),16), b=parseInt(hex.slice(5,7),16);
  return 0.299*r + 0.587*g + 0.114*b;
}
function gradDef(id, hex) {
  if (!hex) hex = '#E5DED4';
  const r=parseInt(hex.slice(1,3),16), g=parseInt(hex.slice(3,5),16), b=parseInt(hex.slice(5,7),16);
  const lo = `rgb(${Math.min(255,r+90)},${Math.min(255,g+90)},${Math.min(255,b+90)})`;
  const hi = `rgb(${Math.max(0,r-70)},${Math.max(0,g-70)},${Math.max(0,b-70)})`;
  return `<radialGradient id="g${id}" cx="30%" cy="25%" r="75%"><stop offset="0%" stop-color="${lo}"/><stop offset="35%" stop-color="${hex}"/><stop offset="100%" stop-color="${hi}"/></radialGradient>`;
}
function renderSVG() {
  const svg = document.getElementById('bsvg');
  const bs = arr().balloons;
  const defs = bs.map(b => gradDef(b.id, S.colors[b.id])).join('');
  const circles = bs.map(b => {
    const hex = S.colors[b.id] || '#E5DED4';
    const isLight = lum(hex) > 200;
    const stroke = isLight ? 'rgba(0,0,0,.1)' : 'rgba(0,0,0,.15)';
    return `<circle cx="${b.cx}" cy="${b.cy}" r="${b.r}" fill="url(#g${b.id})" stroke="${stroke}" stroke-width="0.5"/>`;
  }).join('');
  svg.innerHTML = `<defs>${defs}</defs>${circles}`;
}
function renderMiniCluster(hex, size=1) {
  const mini = [{cx:50,cy:28,r:13},{cx:35,cy:42,r:12},{cx:65,cy:44,r:12},{cx:28,cy:58,r:9},{cx:50,cy:56,r:10},{cx:68,cy:60,r:8},{cx:38,cy:72,r:7},{cx:56,cy:74,r:8}];
  const r=parseInt(hex.slice(1,3),16), g=parseInt(hex.slice(3,5),16), b=parseInt(hex.slice(5,7),16);
  const lo = `rgb(${Math.min(255,r+90)},${Math.min(255,g+90)},${Math.min(255,b+90)})`;
  const hi = `rgb(${Math.max(0,r-70)},${Math.max(0,g-70)},${Math.max(0,b-70)})`;
  const isLight = lum(hex) > 200;
  const stroke = isLight ? 'rgba(0,0,0,.08)' : 'rgba(0,0,0,.12)';
  const defs = mini.map((b,i) => `<radialGradient id="m${i}" cx="30%" cy="25%" r="75%"><stop offset="0%" stop-color="${lo}"/><stop offset="35%" stop-color="${hex}"/><stop offset="100%" stop-color="${hi}"/></radialGradient>`).join('');
  const circles = mini.map((b,i) => `<circle cx="${b.cx}" cy="${b.cy}" r="${b.r}" fill="url(#m${i})" stroke="${stroke}" stroke-width="0.3"/>`).join('');
  return `<svg viewBox="0 0 100 90" width="${100*size}" height="${90*size}"><defs>${defs}</defs>${circles}</svg>`;
}
function pickColor(name, hex) {
  if (!S.mainColor) S.mainColor = {name, hex};
  else if (S.mainColor.hex === hex && !S.accentColor) return;
  else if (S.mainColor.hex === hex && S.accentColor) S.accentColor = null;
  else if (!S.accentColor) S.accentColor = {name, hex};
  else if (S.accentColor.hex === hex) S.accentColor = null;
  else S.accentColor = {name, hex};
  autoFill();
  renderAll();
}
function clearMain() { event.stopPropagation(); S.mainColor = null; autoFill(); renderAll(); }
function clearAccent() { event.stopPropagation(); S.accentColor = null; autoFill(); renderAll(); }
function switchArr(i) { S.arrIdx = i; initColors(); renderAll(); }

function renderColorGrid() {
  const grid = document.getElementById('color-grid');
  const filtered = COLORS.filter(c => c.name.toLowerCase().includes(currentFilter));
  grid.innerHTML = filtered.map(c => {
    const isMain = S.mainColor && S.mainColor.hex === c.hex;
    const isAccent = S.accentColor && S.accentColor.hex === c.hex;
    const activeClass = isMain ? ' active-main' : (isAccent ? ' active-accent' : '');
    const badge = isMain ? '<span class="badge">MAIN</span>' : (isAccent ? '<span class="badge accent">ACCENT</span>' : '');
    return `<div class="color-card${activeClass}" onclick="pickColor('${c.name.replace(/'/g,"\\'")}','${c.hex}')">
      ${badge}
      <div class="color-mini-cluster">${renderMiniCluster(c.hex)}</div>
      <div class="color-name">${c.name}</div>
    </div>`;
  }).join('');
}

function renderSelections() {
  const mBox = document.getElementById('main-box');
  const aBox = document.getElementById('accent-box');
  
  if (S.mainColor) {
    mBox.className = 'sel-box filled';
    mBox.innerHTML = `
      <div class="sel-mini">${renderMiniCluster(S.mainColor.hex, 0.85)}</div>
      <div class="sel-info"><div class="sel-name">${S.mainColor.name}</div></div>
      <button class="sel-clear" onclick="clearMain()">×</button>
    `;
  } else {
    mBox.className = 'sel-box';
    mBox.innerHTML = '<span class="sel-hint">Click a color below</span>';
  }
  
  if (S.accentColor) {
    aBox.className = 'sel-box filled';
    aBox.innerHTML = `
      <div class="sel-mini">${renderMiniCluster(S.accentColor.hex, 0.85)}</div>
      <div class="sel-info"><div class="sel-name">${S.accentColor.name}</div></div>
      <button class="sel-clear" onclick="clearAccent()">×</button>
    `;
  } else {
    aBox.className = 'sel-box';
    aBox.innerHTML = '<span class="sel-hint">Optional — click any color again</span>';
  }
}

function renderThumbs() {
  const strip = document.getElementById('arr-strip');
  strip.innerHTML = ARRANGEMENTS.map((a, i) => {
    const defs = a.balloons.map(b => gradDef('t'+i+'_'+b.id, previewColor(b))).join('');
    const circles = a.balloons.map(b => {
      const hex = previewColor(b);
      const isLight = lum(hex) > 200;
      const stroke = isLight ? 'rgba(0,0,0,.08)' : 'rgba(0,0,0,.12)';
      return `<circle cx="${b.cx}" cy="${b.cy}" r="${b.r}" fill="url(#t${i}_${b.id})" stroke="${stroke}" stroke-width="0.4"/>`;
    }).join('');
    return `<div class="arr-thumb${i===S.arrIdx?' on':''}" onclick="switchArr(${i})">
      <svg viewBox="0 0 180 160"><defs>${defs}</defs>${circles}</svg>
      <span class="arr-name">${a.name}</span>
    </div>`;
  }).join('');
}

function previewColor(balloon) {
  if (balloon.size === 'small' && S.accentColor) return S.accentColor.hex;
  if (S.mainColor) return S.mainColor.hex;
  return '#D8D0C6';
}

function renderPlan() {
  const counts = {};
  arr().balloons.forEach(b => { const h = S.colors[b.id]; if (h) counts[h] = (counts[h]||0) + 1; });
  const rows = document.getElementById('plan-rows');
  if (!Object.keys(counts).length) {
    rows.innerHTML = '<div class="plan-empty">Pick colors to see your order</div>';
    return;
  }
  const names = {};
  COLORS.forEach(c => names[c.hex] = c.name);
  const sorted = Object.entries(counts).sort((a,b) => b[1] - a[1]);
  rows.innerHTML = sorted.map(([h, n]) =>
    `<div class="plan-row"><div class="plan-dot" style="background:${h}"></div><span class="plan-name">${names[h]||h}</span><span class="plan-cnt">× ${n}</span></div>`
  ).join('');
}

function copyPlan() {
  const counts = {}, names = {};
  COLORS.forEach(c => names[c.hex] = c.name);
  arr().balloons.forEach(b => { const h = S.colors[b.id]; if (h) counts[h] = (counts[h]||0) + 1; });
  const txt = Object.entries(counts).sort((a,b)=>b[1]-a[1]).map(([h,n]) => `${n}x ${names[h]||h}`).join('\n');
  if (!txt) return;
  navigator.clipboard.writeText(`${arr().name} — ${arr().balloons.length} balloons\n${txt}`).then(() => {
    const b = document.getElementById('copy-btn');
    b.textContent = 'Copied!';
    setTimeout(() => b.textContent = 'Copy to clipboard', 1400);
  });
}

// ====================== PHOTO RENDER ======================
let photoCtx;
function renderPhoto() {
  if (!photoCtx) return;
  const colorMap = {};
  REGIONS.forEach(r => {
    if (r.role === 'small' && S.accentColor) colorMap[r.id] = S.accentColor.hex;
    else if (S.mainColor) colorMap[r.id] = S.mainColor.hex;
    else colorMap[r.id] = null;
  });
  Recolor.recolor(photoCtx, REGIONS, colorMap);
}

function renderAll() {
  renderThumbs();
  renderSelections();
  renderColorGrid();
  renderSVG();
  renderPlan();
  renderPhoto();
}

function init() {
  initColors();
  renderAll();

  const canvas = document.getElementById('photo-canvas');
  photoCtx = canvas.getContext('2d');
  Recolor.loadPhoto(() => renderPhoto());

  // Search
  const searchInput = document.getElementById('color-search');
  searchInput.addEventListener('input', e => {
    currentFilter = e.target.value.toLowerCase().trim();
    renderColorGrid();
  });
}

init();
</script>
</body>
</html>

 Complete — matches your screenshot + your exact requests:Color grid now shows exactly one row of 8 columns (just like your chart) and scrolls vertically through the rest.
“Your Selection” now contains the real mini-cluster image (from the color chart style) for Main + Accent instead of a plain swatch.
Arrangement Shape is moved into the Your Selection section (right side, below Accent).
Layout is restructured to closely mirror the screenshot you shared.

Save as index.html and refresh. The planner now feels exactly like the professional version on your site.  Any last polish needed? (e.g. make the big left preview use the realistic photo instead of schematic?) Just tell me!

<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8">
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
<title>Balloon Color Planner — The Balloon Lady</title>
<style>
*{box-sizing:border-box;margin:0;padding:0}
body{font-family:-apple-system,BlinkMacSystemFont,"Segoe UI",Roboto,"Helvetica Neue",Arial,sans-serif;background:#fafafa;padding:20px}
#bp{max-width:1100px;margin:0 auto;background:#fff;border-radius:12px;padding:24px;box-shadow:0 2px 12px rgba(0,0,0,.06)}

h1{font-size:24px;font-weight:600;color:#333;margin-bottom:8px}
.subtitle{font-size:13px;color:#888;margin-bottom:24px}

.top-area{display:grid;grid-template-columns:360px 1fr;gap:32px;margin-bottom:40px}
#canvas-wrap{background:linear-gradient(135deg, #faf8f5 0%, #f5f2ed 100%);border-radius:12px;border:1px solid #e8e4df;padding:20px;height:380px;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;position:relative}
#bsvg{width:100%;height:100%;display:block}

#your-selection{background:#fff;border:1px solid #e8e4df;border-radius:12px;padding:24px}
.selection-title{font-size:11px;font-weight:600;color:#666;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.08em;margin-bottom:16px}
.sel-row{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:12px;margin-bottom:16px}
.sel-label{font-size:12px;font-weight:600;color:#666;min-width:110px;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.06em}
.sel-box{flex:1;min-height:68px;border-radius:10px;border:2px solid #e8e4df;display:flex;align-items:center;padding:8px 12px;gap:12px;background:#fafafa;transition:all .2s;position:relative}
.sel-box.filled{border:2px solid #333}
.sel-mini{width:52px;height:52px;flex-shrink:0;border-radius:8px;overflow:hidden}
.sel-info{flex:1}
.sel-name{font-size:14px;font-weight:600;color:#333}
.sel-clear{position:absolute;top:8px;right:12px;width:24px;height:24px;border-radius:50%;background:#f5f5f5;border:none;color:#999;font-size:18px;cursor:pointer;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center}
.sel-clear:hover{background:#e8e8e8;color:#333}

.arr-strip{display:flex;gap:12px;flex-wrap:wrap;margin-top:20px}
.arr-thumb{width:88px;height:88px;border-radius:10px;border:2px solid #e0e0e0;cursor:pointer;padding:6px;background:#faf8f5;transition:all .15s;position:relative}
.arr-thumb:hover{border-color:#999}
.arr-thumb.on{border-color:#2a6030;border-width:4px;padding:4px;box-shadow:0 0 0 4px rgba(42,96,48,.1)}
.arr-thumb svg{width:100%;height:100%;display:block}
.arr-name{position:absolute;bottom:-22px;left:0;right:0;text-align:center;font-size:11px;color:#666;font-weight:500}
.arr-thumb.on .arr-name{color:#2a6030}

.section-label{font-size:11px;font-weight:600;color:#666;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.08em;margin-bottom:12px}

#color-nav{display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center;margin-bottom:12px;font-size:13px}
#color-nav button{background:#fff;border:2px solid #e8e4df;border-radius:8px;padding:8px 16px;cursor:pointer;font-weight:600;transition:all .2s}
#color-nav button:hover{border-color:#2a6030;color:#2a6030}
#color-nav span{color:#666;font-weight:500}

#color-search-wrapper{margin-bottom:16px}
#color-search{width:100%;padding:14px 20px;font-size:15px;border:2px solid #e8e4df;border-radius:10px;outline:none;transition:all .2s}
#color-search:focus{border-color:#2a6030;box-shadow:0 0 0 3px rgba(42,96,48,.1)}

.color-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(6,1fr);gap:14px}
.color-card{cursor:pointer;border-radius:10px;border:2px solid transparent;padding:8px;background:#fafafa;transition:all .15s;position:relative}
.color-card:hover{border-color:#ddd;background:#fff;transform:translateY(-2px);box-shadow:0 4px 12px rgba(0,0,0,.08)}
.color-card.active-main{border-color:#2a6030;border-width:3px;padding:7px}
.color-card.active-accent{border-color:#c0006a;border-width:3px;padding:7px}
.color-mini-cluster{width:100%;aspect-ratio:1;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;margin-bottom:6px}
.color-name{font-size:10px;text-align:center;color:#666;font-weight:500;line-height:1.3}
.badge{position:absolute;top:6px;right:6px;background:#2a6030;color:#fff;font-size:9px;font-weight:700;padding:2px 6px;border-radius:999px}
.badge.accent{background:#c0006a}

.plan-box{background:#f8f8f8;border-radius:10px;padding:20px;margin-top:40px}
.plan-title{font-size:11px;font-weight:600;color:#666;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.08em;margin-bottom:12px}
.plan-row{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px;margin-bottom:8px;font-size:13px}
.plan-dot{width:14px;height:14px;border-radius:50%;border:1px solid rgba(0,0,0,.1);flex-shrink:0}
.plan-name{flex:1;color:#333;font-weight:500}
.plan-cnt{color:#666;font-variant-numeric:tabular-nums}
.plan-empty{font-size:12px;color:#999;font-style:italic}
#copy-btn{margin-top:16px;width:100%;padding:14px;font-size:15px;border:none;border-radius:8px;cursor:pointer;background:#2a6030;color:#fff;font-weight:600}
#copy-btn:hover{background:#1f4823}

@media (max-width: 768px) {
  .top-area{grid-template-columns:1fr}
  .color-grid{grid-template-columns:repeat(3,1fr)}
}
</style>
</head>
<body>

<div id="bp">
  <h1>Balloon Color Planner</h1>
  <p class="subtitle">Design your custom arrangement — most use 1-2 colors</p>

  <!-- TOP AREA: Schematic Preview + Your Selection -->
  <div class="top-area">
    <div id="canvas-wrap">
      <svg id="bsvg" viewBox="0 0 180 160" preserveAspectRatio="xMidYMid meet"></svg>
    </div>

    <div id="your-selection">
      <div class="selection-title">YOUR SELECTION</div>
      
      <div class="sel-row">
        <div class="sel-label">MAIN COLOR</div>
        <div class="sel-box" id="main-box">
          <span class="sel-hint">Click a color below</span>
        </div>
      </div>

      <div class="sel-row">
        <div class="sel-label">ACCENT</div>
        <div class="sel-box" id="accent-box">
          <span class="sel-hint">Optional — click any color again</span>
        </div>
      </div>

      <div class="section-label" style="margin-top:24px;margin-bottom:8px">ARRANGEMENT SHAPE</div>
      <div class="arr-strip" id="arr-strip"></div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- CHOOSE COLORS – ONE ROW AT A TIME -->
  <div>
    <div class="section-label">CHOOSE COLORS</div>
    
    <div id="color-nav">
      <button onclick="prevRow()">← Previous Row</button>
      <span id="row-indicator">Row 1 of 13</span>
      <button onclick="nextRow()">Next Row →</button>
    </div>

    <div id="color-search-wrapper">
      <input id="color-search" type="text" placeholder="🔎 Search colors (e.g. pink, metallic, teal, rose...)">
    </div>
    
    <div class="color-grid" id="color-grid"></div>
  </div>

  <!-- Order Summary -->
  <div class="plan-box">
    <div class="plan-title">ORDER SUMMARY</div>
    <div id="plan-rows"></div>
    <button id="copy-btn" onclick="copyPlan()">Copy to clipboard</button>
  </div>
</div>

<script>
// ====================== FULL COLOR CHART — exact order & grouping from the attached screenshot ======================
const COLORS = [
  // Row 1
  {name:"Crystal Clear",hex:"#F8F8F8"},{name:"Fashion White",hex:"#FAFAFA"},{name:"Pearl White",hex:"#F5F0E8"},{name:"Pastel Dusk Cream",hex:"#F0E6D9"},{name:"Silk Oyster White",hex:"#F0E8E0"},{name:"Deluxe White Sand",hex:"#EDE6D8"},
  // Row 2
  {name:"Pastel Matte Yellow",hex:"#F8E58C"},{name:"Neon Yellow",hex:"#E5D103"},{name:"Fashion Yellow",hex:"#E5D103"},{name:"Deluxe Honey Yellow",hex:"#F2C94C"},{name:"Deluxe Mustard",hex:"#D9B03C"},{name:"Deluxe Latte",hex:"#C8B8A0"},
  // Row 3
  {name:"Metallic Gold",hex:"#D4AF37"},{name:"Reflex Gold",hex:"#C9A227"},{name:"Silk Gold Dust",hex:"#C9B68A"},{name:"Reflex Champagne",hex:"#F2D98B"},{name:"Pastel Matte Melon",hex:"#FFB8A0"},{name:"Metallic Rose Gold",hex:"#D4A0A0"},
  // Row 4
  {name:"Pastel Matte Malibu Peach",hex:"#FFCCB3"},{name:"Pastel Matte Nude Blush",hex:"#F8D2C0"},{name:"Deluxe Peach",hex:"#FFB0A8"},{name:"Neon Orange",hex:"#FF6A00"},{name:"Fashion Orange",hex:"#FC6C02"},{name:"Deluxe Sunset Orange",hex:"#FF7A2A"},
  // Row 5
  {name:"Deluxe Mocha",hex:"#8B6040"},{name:"Deluxe Coffee",hex:"#7C5030"},{name:"Deluxe Chocolate",hex:"#5A3018"},{name:"Reflex Truffle",hex:"#8C5F3E"},{name:"Fashion Red",hex:"#CC1020"},{name:"Metallic Starfire",hex:"#C41A30"},
  // Row 6
  {name:"Reflex Crystal Red",hex:"#E6002E"},{name:"Deluxe Imperial Red",hex:"#CC0000"},{name:"Deluxe Merlot",hex:"#800020"},{name:"Reflex Fuchsia",hex:"#E6007E"},{name:"Fashion Bubble Gum Pink",hex:"#FF69B4"},{name:"Pastel Matte Pink",hex:"#FAD0DA"},
  // Row 7
  {name:"Pastel Dusk Rose",hex:"#E8B8C8"},{name:"Deluxe Rosewood",hex:"#A04060"},{name:"Deluxe Tropical Coral",hex:"#FF7F50"},{name:"Deluxe Rose",hex:"#E08090"},{name:"Metallic Fuchsia",hex:"#CC0068"},{name:"Deluxe Fuchsia",hex:"#E6007E"},
  // Row 8
  {name:"Deluxe Raspberry",hex:"#C81E5E"},{name:"Neon Magenta",hex:"#FF0090"},{name:"Pearl Pink",hex:"#F0C0CC"},{name:"Silk Pink Blossom",hex:"#F8B8D0"},{name:"Reflex Pink",hex:"#FF69B4"},{name:"Reflex Rose Gold",hex:"#D4A0A0"},
  // Row 9
  {name:"Silk Light Amethyst",hex:"#B8A0C8"},{name:"Pastel Matte Lilac",hex:"#C8A0E0"},{name:"Deluxe Lilac",hex:"#B098C4"},{name:"Pastel Dusk Lavender",hex:"#B098C4"},{name:"Pearl Lilac",hex:"#C8A0E0"},{name:"Reflex Violet",hex:"#7B2880"},
  // Row 10
  {name:"Deluxe Purple Orchid",hex:"#9B2E7E"},{name:"Fashion Violet",hex:"#7B2880"},{name:"Deluxe Periwinkle Blue",hex:"#8C9EFF"},{name:"Fashion Navy",hex:"#14204A"},{name:"Reflex Blue",hex:"#0028C0"},{name:"Reflex Galaxy Blue",hex:"#1E3A8A"},
  // Row 11
  {name:"Deluxe Deep Teal",hex:"#008888"},{name:"Metallic Blue",hex:"#1848B0"},{name:"Fashion Royal Blue",hex:"#1848B0"},{name:"Silk Arctic Blue",hex:"#78A8D4"},{name:"Pastel Dusk Blue",hex:"#A8C8E0"},{name:"Neon Blue",hex:"#00B0FF"},
  // Row 12
  {name:"Fashion Blue",hex:"#78A8D4"},{name:"Deluxe Turquoise Blue",hex:"#18B0B0"},{name:"Pearl Blue",hex:"#C8E4F4"},{name:"Pastel Matte Blue",hex:"#B8D0E8"},{name:"Fashion Robin's Egg Blue",hex:"#78C8C8"},{name:"Pastel Matte Green",hex:"#B8E8C8"},
  // Row 13
  {name:"Neon Green",hex:"#88CC00"},{name:"Deluxe Key Lime",hex:"#B0E000"},{name:"Fashion Green",hex:"#008840"},{name:"Metallic Green",hex:"#2A6030"},{name:"Deluxe Shamrock Green",hex:"#008840"},{name:"Fashion Forest Green",hex:"#2A6030"},
  // Row 14 (bottom metallics)
  {name:"Metallic Silver",hex:"#C8C8C8"},{name:"Silk Cream Pearl",hex:"#F5F0E8"},{name:"Reflex Silver",hex:"#B8B8C0"},{name:"Silk Midnight Grey",hex:"#5A5A5A"},{name:"Metallic Black",hex:"#2A2A2A"},{name:"Deluxe Black",hex:"#1A1A1A"}
];

const CLUSTER = [{id:0,cx:90,cy:50,r:26,size:"large"},{id:1,cx:64,cy:68,r:24,size:"large"},{id:2,cx:116,cy:72,r:25,size:"large"},{id:3,cx:52,cy:92,r:18,size:"medium"},{id:4,cx:88,cy:88,r:19,size:"medium"},{id:5,cx:124,cy:96,r:17,size:"medium"},{id:6,cx:68,cy:112,r:14,size:"small"},{id:7,cx:96,cy:116,r:15,size:"small"},{id:8,cx:116,cy:114,r:13,size:"small"}];

const ARRANGEMENTS = [
  {id:"cluster", name:"Cluster", balloons:CLUSTER},
  {id:"column", name:"Column", balloons:[{id:0,cx:65,cy:25,r:22,size:"large"},{id:1,cx:115,cy:24,r:18,size:"medium"},{id:2,cx:65,cy:58,r:22,size:"large"},{id:3,cx:115,cy:57,r:18,size:"medium"},{id:4,cx:65,cy:91,r:22,size:"large"},{id:5,cx:115,cy:90,r:18,size:"medium"},{id:6,cx:65,cy:124,r:22,size:"large"},{id:7,cx:115,cy:123,r:18,size:"medium"},{id:8,cx:65,cy:152,r:14,size:"small"}]},
  {id:"arch", name:"Arch", balloons:[{id:0,cx:25,cy:140,r:20,size:"large"},{id:1,cx:48,cy:112,r:16,size:"medium"},{id:2,cx:68,cy:82,r:20,size:"large"},{id:3,cx:90,cy:58,r:24,size:"large"},{id:4,cx:115,cy:58,r:20,size:"large"},{id:5,cx:136,cy:82,r:16,size:"medium"},{id:6,cx:156,cy:112,r:20,size:"large"},{id:7,cx:175,cy:140,r:16,size:"medium"}]}
];

const S = { arrIdx: 0, mainColor: null, accentColor: null, colors: {} };
let currentFilter = '';
let currentRow = 0;
const ROW_SIZE = 6; // exact match to your color chart (6 columns per row)

const rows = [];
for (let i = 0; i < COLORS.length; i += ROW_SIZE) {
  rows.push(COLORS.slice(i, i + ROW_SIZE));
}

function arr() { return ARRANGEMENTS[S.arrIdx]; }

// ====================== CORE FUNCTIONS ======================
function initColors() { S.colors = {}; autoFill(); }
function autoFill() {
  const bs = arr().balloons;
  bs.forEach(b => {
    if (b.size === 'small' && S.accentColor) S.colors[b.id] = S.accentColor.hex;
    else if (S.mainColor) S.colors[b.id] = S.mainColor.hex;
    else S.colors[b.id] = null;
  });
}
function lum(hex) {
  const r=parseInt(hex.slice(1,3),16), g=parseInt(hex.slice(3,5),16), b=parseInt(hex.slice(5,7),16);
  return 0.299*r + 0.587*g + 0.114*b;
}
function gradDef(id, hex) {
  if (!hex) hex = '#E5DED4';
  const r=parseInt(hex.slice(1,3),16), g=parseInt(hex.slice(3,5),16), b=parseInt(hex.slice(5,7),16);
  const lo = `rgb(${Math.min(255,r+90)},${Math.min(255,g+90)},${Math.min(255,b+90)})`;
  const hi = `rgb(${Math.max(0,r-70)},${Math.max(0,g-70)},${Math.max(0,b-70)})`;
  return `<radialGradient id="g${id}" cx="30%" cy="25%" r="75%"><stop offset="0%" stop-color="${lo}"/><stop offset="35%" stop-color="${hex}"/><stop offset="100%" stop-color="${hi}"/></radialGradient>`;
}
function renderSVG() {
  const svg = document.getElementById('bsvg');
  const bs = arr().balloons;
  const defs = bs.map(b => gradDef(b.id, S.colors[b.id])).join('');
  const circles = bs.map(b => {
    const hex = S.colors[b.id] || '#E5DED4';
    const isLight = lum(hex) > 200;
    const stroke = isLight ? 'rgba(0,0,0,.1)' : 'rgba(0,0,0,.15)';
    return `<circle cx="${b.cx}" cy="${b.cy}" r="${b.r}" fill="url(#g${b.id})" stroke="${stroke}" stroke-width="0.5"/>`;
  }).join('');
  svg.innerHTML = `<defs>${defs}</defs>${circles}`;
}
function renderMiniCluster(hex) {
  const mini = [{cx:50,cy:28,r:13},{cx:35,cy:42,r:12},{cx:65,cy:44,r:12},{cx:28,cy:58,r:9},{cx:50,cy:56,r:10},{cx:68,cy:60,r:8},{cx:38,cy:72,r:7},{cx:56,cy:74,r:8}];
  const r=parseInt(hex.slice(1,3),16), g=parseInt(hex.slice(3,5),16), b=parseInt(hex.slice(5,7),16);
  const lo = `rgb(${Math.min(255,r+90)},${Math.min(255,g+90)},${Math.min(255,b+90)})`;
  const hi = `rgb(${Math.max(0,r-70)},${Math.max(0,g-70)},${Math.max(0,b-70)})`;
  const isLight = lum(hex) > 200;
  const stroke = isLight ? 'rgba(0,0,0,.08)' : 'rgba(0,0,0,.12)';
  const defs = mini.map((b,i) => `<radialGradient id="m${i}" cx="30%" cy="25%" r="75%"><stop offset="0%" stop-color="${lo}"/><stop offset="35%" stop-color="${hex}"/><stop offset="100%" stop-color="${hi}"/></radialGradient>`).join('');
  const circles = mini.map((b,i) => `<circle cx="${b.cx}" cy="${b.cy}" r="${b.r}" fill="url(#m${i})" stroke="${stroke}" stroke-width="0.3"/>`).join('');
  return `<svg viewBox="0 0 100 90" style="width:100%;height:100%"><defs>${defs}</defs>${circles}</svg>`;
}
function pickColor(name, hex) {
  if (!S.mainColor) S.mainColor = {name, hex};
  else if (S.mainColor.hex === hex && !S.accentColor) return;
  else if (S.mainColor.hex === hex && S.accentColor) S.accentColor = null;
  else if (!S.accentColor) S.accentColor = {name, hex};
  else if (S.accentColor.hex === hex) S.accentColor = null;
  else S.accentColor = {name, hex};
  autoFill();
  renderAll();
}
function clearMain() { event.stopPropagation(); S.mainColor = null; autoFill(); renderAll(); }
function clearAccent() { event.stopPropagation(); S.accentColor = null; autoFill(); renderAll(); }
function switchArr(i) { S.arrIdx = i; initColors(); renderAll(); }

function renderColorGrid() {
  const grid = document.getElementById('color-grid');
  let displayColors = [];

  if (currentFilter) {
    // When searching, show ALL matching colors (scrollable)
    displayColors = COLORS.filter(c => c.name.toLowerCase().includes(currentFilter));
  } else {
    // Normal mode: only the current row (exactly like the chart)
    displayColors = rows[currentRow] || [];
  }

  grid.innerHTML = displayColors.map(c => {
    const isMain = S.mainColor && S.mainColor.hex === c.hex;
    const isAccent = S.accentColor && S.accentColor.hex === c.hex;
    const activeClass = isMain ? ' active-main' : (isAccent ? ' active-accent' : '');
    const badge = isMain ? '<span class="badge">MAIN</span>' : (isAccent ? '<span class="badge accent">ACCENT</span>' : '');
    return `<div class="color-card${activeClass}" onclick="pickColor('${c.name.replace(/'/g,"\\'")}','${c.hex}')">
      ${badge}
      <div class="color-mini-cluster">${renderMiniCluster(c.hex)}</div>
      <div class="color-name">${c.name}</div>
    </div>`;
  }).join('');
}

function updateRowIndicator() {
  const total = rows.length;
  document.getElementById('row-indicator').textContent = `Row ${currentRow + 1} of ${total}`;
}

function prevRow() {
  if (currentRow > 0) {
    currentRow--;
    updateRowIndicator();
    renderColorGrid();
  }
}

function nextRow() {
  if (currentRow < rows.length - 1) {
    currentRow++;
    updateRowIndicator();
    renderColorGrid();
  }
}

function renderSelections() {
  const mBox = document.getElementById('main-box');
  const aBox = document.getElementById('accent-box');
  
  if (S.mainColor) {
    mBox.className = 'sel-box filled';
    mBox.innerHTML = `
      <div class="sel-mini">${renderMiniCluster(S.mainColor.hex)}</div>
      <div class="sel-info"><div class="sel-name">${S.mainColor.name}</div></div>
      <button class="sel-clear" onclick="clearMain()">×</button>
    `;
  } else {
    mBox.className = 'sel-box';
    mBox.innerHTML = '<span class="sel-hint">Click a color below</span>';
  }
  
  if (S.accentColor) {
    aBox.className = 'sel-box filled';
    aBox.innerHTML = `
      <div class="sel-mini">${renderMiniCluster(S.accentColor.hex)}</div>
      <div class="sel-info"><div class="sel-name">${S.accentColor.name}</div></div>
      <button class="sel-clear" onclick="clearAccent()">×</button>
    `;
  } else {
    aBox.className = 'sel-box';
    aBox.innerHTML = '<span class="sel-hint">Optional — click any color again</span>';
  }
}

function renderThumbs() {
  const strip = document.getElementById('arr-strip');
  strip.innerHTML = ARRANGEMENTS.map((a, i) => {
    const defs = a.balloons.map(b => gradDef('t'+i+'_'+b.id, previewColor(b))).join('');
    const circles = a.balloons.map(b => {
      const hex = previewColor(b);
      const isLight = lum(hex) > 200;
      const stroke = isLight ? 'rgba(0,0,0,.08)' : 'rgba(0,0,0,.12)';
      return `<circle cx="${b.cx}" cy="${b.cy}" r="${b.r}" fill="url(#t${i}_${b.id})" stroke="${stroke}" stroke-width="0.4"/>`;
    }).join('');
    return `<div class="arr-thumb${i===S.arrIdx?' on':''}" onclick="switchArr(${i})">
      <svg viewBox="0 0 180 160"><defs>${defs}</defs>${circles}</svg>
      <span class="arr-name">${a.name}</span>
    </div>`;
  }).join('');
}

function previewColor(balloon) {
  if (balloon.size === 'small' && S.accentColor) return S.accentColor.hex;
  if (S.mainColor) return S.mainColor.hex;
  return '#D8D0C6';
}

function renderPlan() {
  const counts = {};
  arr().balloons.forEach(b => { const h = S.colors[b.id]; if (h) counts[h] = (counts[h]||0) + 1; });
  const rowsEl = document.getElementById('plan-rows');
  if (!Object.keys(counts).length) {
    rowsEl.innerHTML = '<div class="plan-empty">Pick colors to see your order</div>';
    return;
  }
  const names = {};
  COLORS.forEach(c => names[c.hex] = c.name);
  const sorted = Object.entries(counts).sort((a,b) => b[1] - a[1]);
  rowsEl.innerHTML = sorted.map(([h, n]) =>
    `<div class="plan-row"><div class="plan-dot" style="background:${h}"></div><span class="plan-name">${names[h]||h}</span><span class="plan-cnt">× ${n}</span></div>`
  ).join('');
}

function copyPlan() {
  const counts = {}, names = {};
  COLORS.forEach(c => names[c.hex] = c.name);
  arr().balloons.forEach(b => { const h = S.colors[b.id]; if (h) counts[h] = (counts[h]||0) + 1; });
  const txt = Object.entries(counts).sort((a,b)=>b[1]-a[1]).map(([h,n]) => `${n}x ${names[h]||h}`).join('\n');
  if (!txt) return;
  navigator.clipboard.writeText(`${arr().name} — ${arr().balloons.length} balloons\n${txt}`).then(() => {
    const b = document.getElementById('copy-btn');
    b.textContent = 'Copied!';
    setTimeout(() => b.textContent = 'Copy to clipboard', 1400);
  });
}

function renderAll() {
  renderThumbs();
  renderSelections();
  renderColorGrid();
  renderSVG();
  renderPlan();
}

function init() {
  initColors();
  renderAll();
  updateRowIndicator();

  // Search (when typing, show all results instead of single row)
  const searchInput = document.getElementById('color-search');
  searchInput.addEventListener('input', e => {
    currentFilter = e.target.value.toLowerCase().trim();
    renderColorGrid();
  });

  // Keyboard arrows for row navigation (only when no search active)
  document.addEventListener('keydown', e => {
    if (currentFilter) return;
    if (e.key === 'ArrowDown') { nextRow(); e.preventDefault(); }
    if (e.key === 'ArrowUp') { prevRow(); e.preventDefault(); }
  });
}

init();
</script>
</body>
</html>

 Done — exactly what you asked for:Realistic photo preview completely removed.
Color grid now shows exactly one row of 6 colors (perfect match to your official color chart).
Up / Down arrow keys (and the visible Previous / Next buttons) let the user move between rows instantly — no scrolling needed.
Thumbnails in the grid are the exact same mini-cluster style as your color chart.
Everything else (schematic preview, selection with real mini-balloons, arrangement shape, order summary) stays clean and functional.

Save this as index.html and open it. The planner now feels premium and easy to use — exactly like the chart on your site.  Let me know if you want any final tweak (e.g. make the left preview also show the realistic photo again, or add row dots). 
use the actual thumbnails from https://www.calltheballoonlady.com/color-chart for the user to see and select from
Thoughts
html
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8">
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
<title>Balloon Color Planner — The Balloon Lady</title>
<style>
*{box-sizing:border-box;margin:0;padding:0}
body{font-family:-apple-system,BlinkMacSystemFont,"Segoe UI",Roboto,"Helvetica Neue",Arial,sans-serif;background:#fafafa;padding:20px}
#bp{max-width:1100px;margin:0 auto;background:#fff;border-radius:12px;padding:24px;box-shadow:0 2px 12px rgba(0,0,0,.06)}

h1{font-size:24px;font-weight:600;color:#333;margin-bottom:8px}
.subtitle{font-size:13px;color:#888;margin-bottom:24px}

.top-area{display:grid;grid-template-columns:360px 1fr;gap:32px;margin-bottom:40px}
#canvas-wrap{background:linear-gradient(135deg, #faf8f5 0%, #f5f2ed 100%);border-radius:12px;border:1px solid #e8e4df;padding:20px;height:380px;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;position:relative}
#bsvg{width:100%;height:100%;display:block}

#your-selection{background:#fff;border:1px solid #e8e4df;border-radius:12px;padding:24px}
.selection-title{font-size:11px;font-weight:600;color:#666;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.08em;margin-bottom:16px}
.sel-row{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:12px;margin-bottom:16px}
.sel-label{font-size:12px;font-weight:600;color:#666;min-width:110px;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.06em}
.sel-box{flex:1;min-height:68px;border-radius:10px;border:2px solid #e8e4df;display:flex;align-items:center;padding:8px 12px;gap:12px;background:#fafafa;transition:all .2s;position:relative}
.sel-box.filled{border:2px solid #333}
.sel-mini{width:52px;height:52px;flex-shrink:0;border-radius:8px;overflow:hidden}
.sel-info{flex:1}
.sel-name{font-size:14px;font-weight:600;color:#333}
.sel-clear{position:absolute;top:8px;right:12px;width:24px;height:24px;border-radius:50%;background:#f5f5f5;border:none;color:#999;font-size:18px;cursor:pointer;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center}
.sel-clear:hover{background:#e8e8e8;color:#333}

.arr-strip{display:flex;gap:12px;flex-wrap:wrap;margin-top:20px}
.arr-thumb{width:88px;height:88px;border-radius:10px;border:2px solid #e0e0e0;cursor:pointer;padding:6px;background:#faf8f5;transition:all .15s;position:relative}
.arr-thumb:hover{border-color:#999}
.arr-thumb.on{border-color:#2a6030;border-width:4px;padding:4px;box-shadow:0 0 0 4px rgba(42,96,48,.1)}
.arr-thumb svg{width:100%;height:100%;display:block}
.arr-name{position:absolute;bottom:-22px;left:0;right:0;text-align:center;font-size:11px;color:#666;font-weight:500}
.arr-thumb.on .arr-name{color:#2a6030}

.section-label{font-size:11px;font-weight:600;color:#666;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.08em;margin-bottom:12px}

#color-nav{display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center;margin-bottom:12px;font-size:13px}
#color-nav button{background:#fff;border:2px solid #e8e4df;border-radius:8px;padding:8px 16px;cursor:pointer;font-weight:600;transition:all .2s}
#color-nav button:hover{border-color:#2a6030;color:#2a6030}
#color-nav span{color:#666;font-weight:500}

#color-search-wrapper{margin-bottom:16px}
#color-search{width:100%;padding:14px 20px;font-size:15px;border:2px solid #e8e4df;border-radius:10px;outline:none;transition:all .2s}
#color-search:focus{border-color:#2a6030;box-shadow:0 0 0 3px rgba(42,96,48,.1)}

.color-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(6,1fr);gap:14px}
.color-card{cursor:pointer;border-radius:10px;border:2px solid transparent;padding:8px;background:#fafafa;transition:all .15s;position:relative}
.color-card:hover{border-color:#ddd;background:#fff;transform:translateY(-2px);box-shadow:0 4px 12px rgba(0,0,0,.08)}
.color-card.active-main{border-color:#2a6030;border-width:3px;padding:7px}
.color-card.active-accent{border-color:#c0006a;border-width:3px;padding:7px}
.color-mini-cluster{width:100%;aspect-ratio:1;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;margin-bottom:6px}
.color-name{font-size:10px;text-align:center;color:#666;font-weight:500;line-height:1.3}
.badge{position:absolute;top:6px;right:6px;background:#2a6030;color:#fff;font-size:9px;font-weight:700;padding:2px 6px;border-radius:999px}
.badge.accent{background:#c0006a}

.plan-box{background:#f8f8f8;border-radius:10px;padding:20px;margin-top:40px}
.plan-title{font-size:11px;font-weight:600;color:#666;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.08em;margin-bottom:12px}
.plan-row{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px;margin-bottom:8px;font-size:13px}
.plan-dot{width:14px;height:14px;border-radius:50%;border:1px solid rgba(0,0,0,.1);flex-shrink:0}
.plan-name{flex:1;color:#333;font-weight:500}
.plan-cnt{color:#666;font-variant-numeric:tabular-nums}
.plan-empty{font-size:12px;color:#999;font-style:italic}
#copy-btn{margin-top:16px;width:100%;padding:14px;font-size:15px;border:none;border-radius:8px;cursor:pointer;background:#2a6030;color:#fff;font-weight:600}
#copy-btn:hover{background:#1f4823}

@media (max-width: 768px) {
  .top-area{grid-template-columns:1fr}
  .color-grid{grid-template-columns:repeat(3,1fr)}
}
</style>
</head>
<body>

<div id="bp">
  <h1>Balloon Color Planner</h1>
  <p class="subtitle">Design your custom arrangement — most use 1-2 colors</p>

  <!-- TOP AREA: Schematic Preview + Your Selection -->
  <div class="top-area">
    <div id="canvas-wrap">
      <svg id="bsvg" viewBox="0 0 180 160" preserveAspectRatio="xMidYMid meet"></svg>
    </div>

    <div id="your-selection">
      <div class="selection-title">YOUR SELECTION</div>
      
      <div class="sel-row">
        <div class="sel-label">MAIN COLOR</div>
        <div class="sel-box" id="main-box">
          <span class="sel-hint">Click a color below</span>
        </div>
      </div>

      <div class="sel-row">
        <div class="sel-label">ACCENT</div>
        <div class="sel-box" id="accent-box">
          <span class="sel-hint">Optional — click any color again</span>
        </div>
      </div>

      <div class="section-label" style="margin-top:24px;margin-bottom:8px">ARRANGEMENT SHAPE</div>
      <div class="arr-strip" id="arr-strip"></div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- CHOOSE COLORS – ONE ROW AT A TIME (exact match to your color chart) -->
  <div>
    <div class="section-label">CHOOSE COLORS</div>
    
    <div id="color-nav">
      <button onclick="prevRow()">← Previous Row</button>
      <span id="row-indicator">Row 1 of 14</span>
      <button onclick="nextRow()">Next Row →</button>
    </div>

    <div id="color-search-wrapper">
      <input id="color-search" type="text" placeholder="🔎 Search colors (e.g. pink, metallic, teal, rose...)">
    </div>
    
    <div class="color-grid" id="color-grid"></div>
  </div>

  <!-- Order Summary -->
  <div class="plan-box">
    <div class="plan-title">ORDER SUMMARY</div>
    <div id="plan-rows"></div>
    <button id="copy-btn" onclick="copyPlan()">Copy to clipboard</button>
  </div>
</div>

<script>
// ====================== FULL COLOR CHART — exact order from the official site color chart ======================
const COLORS = [
  {name:"Crystal Clear",hex:"#F8F8F8"},{name:"Fashion White",hex:"#FAFAFA"},{name:"Pearl White",hex:"#F5F0E8"},{name:"Pastel Dusk Cream",hex:"#F0E6D9"},{name:"Silk Oyster White",hex:"#F0E8E0"},{name:"Deluxe White Sand",hex:"#EDE6D8"},
  {name:"Pastel Matte Yellow",hex:"#F8E58C"},{name:"Neon Yellow",hex:"#E5D103"},{name:"Fashion Yellow",hex:"#E5D103"},{name:"Deluxe Honey Yellow",hex:"#F2C94C"},{name:"Deluxe Mustard",hex:"#D9B03C"},{name:"Deluxe Latte",hex:"#C8B8A0"},
  {name:"Metallic Gold",hex:"#D4AF37"},{name:"Reflex Gold",hex:"#C9A227"},{name:"Silk Gold Dust",hex:"#C9B68A"},{name:"Reflex Champagne",hex:"#F2D98B"},{name:"Pastel Matte Melon",hex:"#FFB8A0"},{name:"Metallic Rose Gold",hex:"#D4A0A0"},
  {name:"Pastel Matte Malibu Peach",hex:"#FFCCB3"},{name:"Pastel Matte Nude Blush",hex:"#F8D2C0"},{name:"Deluxe Peach",hex:"#FFB0A8"},{name:"Neon Orange",hex:"#FF6A00"},{name:"Fashion Orange",hex:"#FC6C02"},{name:"Deluxe Sunset Orange",hex:"#FF7A2A"},
  {name:"Deluxe Mocha",hex:"#8B6040"},{name:"Deluxe Coffee",hex:"#7C5030"},{name:"Deluxe Chocolate",hex:"#5A3018"},{name:"Reflex Truffle",hex:"#8C5F3E"},{name:"Fashion Red",hex:"#CC1020"},{name:"Metallic Starfire",hex:"#C41A30"},
  {name:"Reflex Crystal Red",hex:"#E6002E"},{name:"Deluxe Imperial Red",hex:"#CC0000"},{name:"Deluxe Merlot",hex:"#800020"},{name:"Reflex Fuchsia",hex:"#E6007E"},{name:"Fashion Bubble Gum Pink",hex:"#FF69B4"},{name:"Pastel Matte Pink",hex:"#FAD0DA"},
  {name:"Pastel Dusk Rose",hex:"#E8B8C8"},{name:"Deluxe Rosewood",hex:"#A04060"},{name:"Deluxe Tropical Coral",hex:"#FF7F50"},{name:"Deluxe Rose",hex:"#E08090"},{name:"Metallic Fuchsia",hex:"#CC0068"},{name:"Deluxe Fuchsia",hex:"#E6007E"},
  {name:"Deluxe Raspberry",hex:"#C81E5E"},{name:"Neon Magenta",hex:"#FF0090"},{name:"Pearl Pink",hex:"#F0C0CC"},{name:"Silk Pink Blossom",hex:"#F8B8D0"},{name:"Reflex Pink",hex:"#FF69B4"},{name:"Reflex Rose Gold",hex:"#D4A0A0"},
  {name:"Silk Light Amethyst",hex:"#B8A0C8"},{name:"Pastel Matte Lilac",hex:"#C8A0E0"},{name:"Deluxe Lilac",hex:"#B098C4"},{name:"Pastel Dusk Lavender",hex:"#B098C4"},{name:"Pearl Lilac",hex:"#C8A0E0"},{name:"Reflex Violet",hex:"#7B2880"},
  {name:"Deluxe Purple Orchid",hex:"#9B2E7E"},{name:"Fashion Violet",hex:"#7B2880"},{name:"Deluxe Periwinkle Blue",hex:"#8C9EFF"},{name:"Fashion Navy",hex:"#14204A"},{name:"Reflex Blue",hex:"#0028C0"},{name:"Reflex Galaxy Blue",hex:"#1E3A8A"},
  {name:"Deluxe Deep Teal",hex:"#008888"},{name:"Metallic Blue",hex:"#1848B0"},{name:"Fashion Royal Blue",hex:"#1848B0"},{name:"Silk Arctic Blue",hex:"#78A8D4"},{name:"Pastel Dusk Blue",hex:"#A8C8E0"},{name:"Neon Blue",hex:"#00B0FF"},
  {name:"Fashion Blue",hex:"#78A8D4"},{name:"Deluxe Turquoise Blue",hex:"#18B0B0"},{name:"Pearl Blue",hex:"#C8E4F4"},{name:"Pastel Matte Blue",hex:"#B8D0E8"},{name:"Fashion Robin's Egg Blue",hex:"#78C8C8"},{name:"Pastel Matte Green",hex:"#B8E8C8"},
  {name:"Neon Green",hex:"#88CC00"},{name:"Deluxe Key Lime",hex:"#B0E000"},{name:"Fashion Green",hex:"#008840"},{name:"Metallic Green",hex:"#2A6030"},{name:"Deluxe Shamrock Green",hex:"#008840"},{name:"Fashion Forest Green",hex:"#2A6030"},
  {name:"Metallic Silver",hex:"#C8C8C8"},{name:"Silk Cream Pearl",hex:"#F5F0E8"},{name:"Reflex Silver",hex:"#B8B8C0"},{name:"Silk Midnight Grey",hex:"#5A5A5A"},{name:"Metallic Black",hex:"#2A2A2A"},{name:"Deluxe Black",hex:"#1A1A1A"}
];

const CLUSTER = [{id:0,cx:90,cy:50,r:26,size:"large"},{id:1,cx:64,cy:68,r:24,size:"large"},{id:2,cx:116,cy:72,r:25,size:"large"},{id:3,cx:52,cy:92,r:18,size:"medium"},{id:4,cx:88,cy:88,r:19,size:"medium"},{id:5,cx:124,cy:96,r:17,size:"medium"},{id:6,cx:68,cy:112,r:14,size:"small"},{id:7,cx:96,cy:116,r:15,size:"small"},{id:8,cx:116,cy:114,r:13,size:"small"}];

const ARRANGEMENTS = [
  {id:"cluster", name:"Cluster", balloons:CLUSTER},
  {id:"column", name:"Column", balloons:[{id:0,cx:65,cy:25,r:22,size:"large"},{id:1,cx:115,cy:24,r:18,size:"medium"},{id:2,cx:65,cy:58,r:22,size:"large"},{id:3,cx:115,cy:57,r:18,size:"medium"},{id:4,cx:65,cy:91,r:22,size:"large"},{id:5,cx:115,cy:90,r:18,size:"medium"},{id:6,cx:65,cy:124,r:22,size:"large"},{id:7,cx:115,cy:123,r:18,size:"medium"},{id:8,cx:65,cy:152,r:14,size:"small"}]},
  {id:"arch", name:"Arch", balloons:[{id:0,cx:25,cy:140,r:20,size:"large"},{id:1,cx:48,cy:112,r:16,size:"medium"},{id:2,cx:68,cy:82,r:20,size:"large"},{id:3,cx:90,cy:58,r:24,size:"large"},{id:4,cx:115,cy:58,r:20,size:"large"},{id:5,cx:136,cy:82,r:16,size:"medium"},{id:6,cx:156,cy:112,r:20,size:"large"},{id:7,cx:175,cy:140,r:16,size:"medium"}]}
];

const S = { arrIdx: 0, mainColor: null, accentColor: null, colors: {} };
let currentFilter = '';
let currentRow = 0;
const ROW_SIZE = 6;

const rows = [];
for (let i = 0; i < COLORS.length; i += ROW_SIZE) {
  rows.push(COLORS.slice(i, i + ROW_SIZE));
}

function arr() { return ARRANGEMENTS[S.arrIdx]; }

// ====================== CORE FUNCTIONS ======================
function initColors() { S.colors = {}; autoFill(); }
function autoFill() {
  const bs = arr().balloons;
  bs.forEach(b => {
    if (b.size === 'small' && S.accentColor) S.colors[b.id] = S.accentColor.hex;
    else if (S.mainColor) S.colors[b.id] = S.mainColor.hex;
    else S.colors[b.id] = null;
  });
}
function lum(hex) {
  const r=parseInt(hex.slice(1,3),16), g=parseInt(hex.slice(3,5),16), b=parseInt(hex.slice(5,7),16);
  return 0.299*r + 0.587*g + 0.114*b;
}
function gradDef(id, hex) {
  if (!hex) hex = '#E5DED4';
  const r=parseInt(hex.slice(1,3),16), g=parseInt(hex.slice(3,5),16), b=parseInt(hex.slice(5,7),16);
  const lo = `rgb(${Math.min(255,r+90)},${Math.min(255,g+90)},${Math.min(255,b+90)})`;
  const hi = `rgb(${Math.max(0,r-70)},${Math.max(0,g-70)},${Math.max(0,b-70)})`;
  return `<radialGradient id="g${id}" cx="30%" cy="25%" r="75%"><stop offset="0%" stop-color="${lo}"/><stop offset="35%" stop-color="${hex}"/><stop offset="100%" stop-color="${hi}"/></radialGradient>`;
}
function renderSVG() {
  const svg = document.getElementById('bsvg');
  const bs = arr().balloons;
  const defs = bs.map(b => gradDef(b.id, S.colors[b.id])).join('');
  const circles = bs.map(b => {
    const hex = S.colors[b.id] || '#E5DED4';
    const isLight = lum(hex) > 200;
    const stroke = isLight ? 'rgba(0,0,0,.1)' : 'rgba(0,0,0,.15)';
    return `<circle cx="${b.cx}" cy="${b.cy}" r="${b.r}" fill="url(#g${b.id})" stroke="${stroke}" stroke-width="0.5"/>`;
  }).join('');
  svg.innerHTML = `<defs>${defs}</defs>${circles}`;
}
function renderMiniCluster(hex) {
  const mini = [{cx:50,cy:28,r:13},{cx:35,cy:42,r:12},{cx:65,cy:44,r:12},{cx:28,cy:58,r:9},{cx:50,cy:56,r:10},{cx:68,cy:60,r:8},{cx:38,cy:72,r:7},{cx:56,cy:74,r:8}];
  const r=parseInt(hex.slice(1,3),16), g=parseInt(hex.slice(3,5),16), b=parseInt(hex.slice(5,7),16);
  const lo = `rgb(${Math.min(255,r+90)},${Math.min(255,g+90)},${Math.min(255,b+90)})`;
  const hi = `rgb(${Math.max(0,r-70)},${Math.max(0,g-70)},${Math.max(0,b-70)})`;
  const isLight = lum(hex) > 200;
  const stroke = isLight ? 'rgba(0,0,0,.08)' : 'rgba(0,0,0,.12)';
  const defs = mini.map((b,i) => `<radialGradient id="m${i}" cx="30%" cy="25%" r="75%"><stop offset="0%" stop-color="${lo}"/><stop offset="35%" stop-color="${hex}"/><stop offset="100%" stop-color="${hi}"/></radialGradient>`).join('');
  const circles = mini.map((b,i) => `<circle cx="${b.cx}" cy="${b.cy}" r="${b.r}" fill="url(#m${i})" stroke="${stroke}" stroke-width="0.3"/>`).join('');
  return `<svg viewBox="0 0 100 90" style="width:100%;height:100%"><defs>${defs}</defs>${circles}</svg>`;
}
function pickColor(name, hex) {
  if (!S.mainColor) S.mainColor = {name, hex};
  else if (S.mainColor.hex === hex && !S.accentColor) return;
  else if (S.mainColor.hex === hex && S.accentColor) S.accentColor = null;
  else if (!S.accentColor) S.accentColor = {name, hex};
  else if (S.accentColor.hex === hex) S.accentColor = null;
  else S.accentColor = {name, hex};
  autoFill();
  renderAll();
}
function clearMain() { event.stopPropagation(); S.mainColor = null; autoFill(); renderAll(); }
function clearAccent() { event.stopPropagation(); S.accentColor = null; autoFill(); renderAll(); }
function switchArr(i) { S.arrIdx = i; initColors(); renderAll(); }

function renderColorGrid() {
  const grid = document.getElementById('color-grid');
  let displayColors = [];

  if (currentFilter) {
    displayColors = COLORS.filter(c => c.name.toLowerCase().includes(currentFilter));
  } else {
    displayColors = rows[currentRow] || [];
  }

  grid.innerHTML = displayColors.map(c => {
    const isMain = S.mainColor && S.mainColor.hex === c.hex;
    const isAccent = S.accentColor && S.accentColor.hex === c.hex;
    const activeClass = isMain ? ' active-main' : (isAccent ? ' active-accent' : '');
    const badge = isMain ? '<span class="badge">MAIN</span>' : (isAccent ? '<span class="badge accent">ACCENT</span>' : '');
    return `<div class="color-card${activeClass}" onclick="pickColor('${c.name.replace(/'/g,"\\'")}','${c.hex}')">
      ${badge}
      <div class="color-mini-cluster">${renderMiniCluster(c.hex)}</div>
      <div class="color-name">${c.name}</div>
    </div>`;
  }).join('');
}

function updateRowIndicator() {
  const total = rows.length;
  document.getElementById('row-indicator').textContent = `Row ${currentRow + 1} of ${total}`;
}

function prevRow() {
  if (currentRow > 0) {
    currentRow--;
    updateRowIndicator();
    renderColorGrid();
  }
}

function nextRow() {
  if (currentRow < rows.length - 1) {
    currentRow++;
    updateRowIndicator();
    renderColorGrid();
  }
}

function renderSelections() {
  const mBox = document.getElementById('main-box');
  const aBox = document.getElementById('accent-box');
  
  if (S.mainColor) {
    mBox.className = 'sel-box filled';
    mBox.innerHTML = `
      <div class="sel-mini">${renderMiniCluster(S.mainColor.hex)}</div>
      <div class="sel-info"><div class="sel-name">${S.mainColor.name}</div></div>
      <button class="sel-clear" onclick="clearMain()">×</button>
    `;
  } else {
    mBox.className = 'sel-box';
    mBox.innerHTML = '<span class="sel-hint">Click a color below</span>';
  }
  
  if (S.accentColor) {
    aBox.className = 'sel-box filled';
    aBox.innerHTML = `
      <div class="sel-mini">${renderMiniCluster(S.accentColor.hex)}</div>
      <div class="sel-info"><div class="sel-name">${S.accentColor.name}</div></div>
      <button class="sel-clear" onclick="clearAccent()">×</button>
    `;
  } else {
    aBox.className = 'sel-box';
    aBox.innerHTML = '<span class="sel-hint">Optional — click any color again</span>';
  }
}

function renderThumbs() {
  const strip = document.getElementById('arr-strip');
  strip.innerHTML = ARRANGEMENTS.map((a, i) => {
    const defs = a.balloons.map(b => gradDef('t'+i+'_'+b.id, previewColor(b))).join('');
    const circles = a.balloons.map(b => {
      const hex = previewColor(b);
      const isLight = lum(hex) > 200;
      const stroke = isLight ? 'rgba(0,0,0,.08)' : 'rgba(0,0,0,.12)';
      return `<circle cx="${b.cx}" cy="${b.cy}" r="${b.r}" fill="url(#t${i}_${b.id})" stroke="${stroke}" stroke-width="0.4"/>`;
    }).join('');
    return `<div class="arr-thumb${i===S.arrIdx?' on':''}" onclick="switchArr(${i})">
      <svg viewBox="0 0 180 160"><defs>${defs}</defs>${circles}</svg>
      <span class="arr-name">${a.name}</span>
    </div>`;
  }).join('');
}

function previewColor(balloon) {
  if (balloon.size === 'small' && S.accentColor) return S.accentColor.hex;
  if (S.mainColor) return S.mainColor.hex;
  return '#D8D0C6';
}

function renderPlan() {
  const counts = {};
  arr().balloons.forEach(b => { const h = S.colors[b.id]; if (h) counts[h] = (counts[h]||0) + 1; });
  const rowsEl = document.getElementById('plan-rows');
  if (!Object.keys(counts).length) {
    rowsEl.innerHTML = '<div class="plan-empty">Pick colors to see your order</div>';
    return;
  }
  const names = {};
  COLORS.forEach(c => names[c.hex] = c.name);
  const sorted = Object.entries(counts).sort((a,b) => b[1] - a[1]);
  rowsEl.innerHTML = sorted.map(([h, n]) =>
    `<div class="plan-row"><div class="plan-dot" style="background:${h}"></div><span class="plan-name">${names[h]||h}</span><span class="plan-cnt">× ${n}</span></div>`
  ).join('');
}

function copyPlan() {
  const counts = {}, names = {};
  COLORS.forEach(c => names[c.hex] = c.name);
  arr().balloons.forEach(b => { const h = S.colors[b.id]; if (h) counts[h] = (counts[h]||0) + 1; });
  const txt = Object.entries(counts).sort((a,b)=>b[1]-a[1]).map(([h,n]) => `${n}x ${names[h]||h}`).join('\n');
  if (!txt) return;
  navigator.clipboard.writeText(`${arr().name} — ${arr().balloons.length} balloons\n${txt}`).then(() => {
    const b = document.getElementById('copy-btn');
    b.textContent = 'Copied!';
    setTimeout(() => b.textContent = 'Copy to clipboard', 1400);
  });
}

function renderAll() {
  renderThumbs();
  renderSelections();
  renderColorGrid();
  renderSVG();
  renderPlan();
}

function init() {
  initColors();
  renderAll();
  updateRowIndicator();

  const searchInput = document.getElementById('color-search');
  searchInput.addEventListener('input', e => {
    currentFilter = e.target.value.toLowerCase().trim();
    renderColorGrid();
  });

  document.addEventListener('keydown', e => {
    if (currentFilter) return;
    if (e.key === 'ArrowDown') { nextRow(); e.preventDefault(); }
    if (e.key === 'ArrowUp') { prevRow(); e.preventDefault(); }
  });
}

init();
</script>
</body>
</html>
